title: IEEE 802.15.4 Protocol Stack and its Role in IoT
description: A layered diagram showing the structure of the IEEE 802.15.4 standard and how it connects to higher-level IoT protocols.
elements: Low-Rate Wireless Personal Area Network (LR-WPAN) Device
relationships: The PHY and MAC layers form the foundation defined by the IEEE 802.15.4 standard
Higher-level protocols (application layer) use the 802.15.4 foundation to create full IoT solutions
LR-WPAN Devices communicate using the protocols built on this stack
